goals.description: Hit 'submit' on the assignment immediately to sever the cycle of perfectionism and honor my commitment to Professor Assignment before my sleep debt forces me into reactive mode.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) dictates that maintaining trust with Professor Assignment is more critical than academic optimization (0.15). Submitting this 'good enough' work is an assertive act of self-preservation; delaying further risks fracturing the bond through exhaustion and resentment, which violates my long-term planning horizon.
